name: founder churn and segment retention
query: Founder: our self-serve product has 40 paying customers, churn is rising after pricing changes, and enterprise retention looks better. Diagnose what changed and what we should do next.

name: pm support tickets to product improvements
query: Product manager: we have 400 support tickets about reporting exports and dashboard filters. Turn them into product themes and prioritized improvements.

name: pm launched feature missed adoption
query: Product manager: the bulk invite feature launched but missed adoption goals. Analyze the results and recommend whether to iterate, rollback, or kill it.

name: cpo roadmap debate decision memo
query: CPO: sales wants SSO, customers want dashboards, and engineering wants reliability work. Turn this roadmap debate into a decision memo with options, tradeoffs, and recommendation.

name: pm confusing workflow design fixes
query: PM: users say the workflow is confusing and completion dropped. Review the UX and produce concrete product/design fixes with success metrics.

name: product ops metrics disagree with warehouse
query: Product ops: dashboard metrics disagree with warehouse data. Define a reliable metrics review and data validation plan.

name: founder expand segment or deepen workflow
query: Founder: we found pull with agencies. Should we expand to in-house teams or deepen agency workflows?

name: pm ab test ship decision
query: PM: our checkout A/B test reached 22,000 users, conversion is up 3.1%, revenue guardrail is flat, and p-value is 0.03. Decide whether to ship, extend, or stop.

name: growth cohort retention diagnosis
query: Growth PM: retention curves changed after onboarding v2. Compare signup cohorts, feature adoption, activation, and churn patterns before we pick growth bets.

name: cpo north star metric selection
query: CPO: we need a North Star Metric and supporting input metrics for our marketplace so product, growth, and sales stop optimizing separate dashboards.

name: growth lead gtm motion choice
query: Growth lead: choose between PLG, sales-led, partner, community, inbound, outbound, and ABM motions for our mid-market security product.

name: growth lead plg playbook diagnosis
query: Growth lead: build a PLG growth playbook for our B2B self-serve product. Diagnose the bottleneck, faster aha path, growth loops, PQL definition, behavior-triggered lifecycle messages, pricing thresholds, and the next growth pod sprint.

name: pm feature request triage
query: PM: triage 180 customer feature requests from sales and support, cluster themes, judge strategic fit, and recommend what enters the backlog.

name: ai builder qa scenarios from spec
query: AI builder: from this feature spec, create QA test scenarios with preconditions, happy paths, edge cases, expected outcomes, and a coverage matrix.

name: pm release notes from shipped tickets
query: PM: turn these shipped tickets and changelog notes into customer-facing release notes organized by new features, improvements, and fixes.
